contents.title: GameNext BCI Geometry Binding - v1
contents.description: Per-region BCI geometry binding for visual and audio parameters, generalized for GameNext environments.

id.description: Stable binding identifier, e.g., monster-mask-shell, grime-body-shell, sky-fog-layer.

region.description: Logical region hint, e.g., foveal, peripheral-ring, sky, character-body, vehicle.

visual.description: Normalized visual parameters for this binding.

maskRadius.description: Radial mask extent from the region center; 0 closes in, 1 fills the region.

maskFeather.description: Softness of the mask edge; higher values yield smoother falloffs.

decayGrain.description: High-frequency detail control; can drive noise for decay, snow, sand, holographic grain, or other surface breakup.

colorDesat.description: Global desaturation amount; styles may remap this to saturation boosts or stylized color grading.

veinOverlay.description: Secondary overlay intensity; can represent veins, cracks, energy conduits, fabric wear, moss, or other line-based overlays.

motionSmear.description: Motion smear or directional blur intensity; typically biased by BCI or gameplay motion state.

paletteHex.description: Array of 6-digit RGB hex colors. Engines normalize this to a fixed-size uniform palette according to the GameNext palette handler.

audio.description: Normalized audio parameters for this binding.

infectedChannelGain.description: Inner-focus or special-channel gain; can drive hallucination layers, inner voice, or emphasized ambience.

squadMuffle.description: Muffle factor for squad, NPC, or auxiliary dialogue buses.

heartbeatGain.description: Gain for heartbeat or internal body-signal buses.

breathGain.description: Gain for breathing, exertion, or fatigue cues.

ringingLevel.description: High-frequency emphasis; can be used for tinnitus, HUD pings, UI shimmer, or similar accents.

direct.description: Direct/dry path gain for clarity channels such as UI, guidance, or critical alerts.

meta.description: Optional per-binding metadata for tuning, analytics, and environment classification.

style.description: Style pack identifier, e.g., Rotting-Visuals, Calm-Exploration, Sci-Fi-Neon.

geometryVersion.description: Engine-side geometry or material version tag, used for migration and analytics.

environmentTag.description: High-level environment label, e.g., desert, city, snow, forest, sci-fi, underwater.

CIC.description: Constellation Integrity Coefficient; overall system confidence and stability gate.

AOS.description: Attention or orientation score; biases where and how strongly bindings are applied.

DET.description: Detection reliability gate; downscales effects when BCI or sensor signals are unreliable.

LSG.description: Latency Safety Guard; limits how quickly visual and audio parameters can change.

UEC.description: Uncertainty and engagement coefficient; optional entertainment metric.

EMD.description: Evidence mystery depth; optional entertainment metric.

STCI.description: Safe-threat contrast index; optional entertainment metric.

CDL.description: Cognitive dissonance load; optional entertainment metric.

ARR.description: Ambiguous resolution rating; optional entertainment metric.
